name: @aristotle/tests-px4-sitl
description: PX4 SITL integration test for @aristotle/mavlink-px4. Drives governFlightCommand end-to-end against a real PX4 SITL UDP endpoint when available, otherwise auto-skips. Closes the in-repo portion of ROADMAP_TO_100.md Category 1 'production hardware integration test for >= 1 adapter'.
